title: Wolfspeed Is Surging on Bullish Analyst Note. What Comes Next for WOLF Stock.
text: Wolfspeed (WOLF) stock surged following a bullish note from Citrini Research highlighting the company's pivot toward artificial intelligence data center applications. The analyst firm released a report titled Crouching Tiger Getting Ready to Reveal a Dragon, positioning WOLF as uniquely advantaged to serve next-generation AI infrastructure needs. Citrini's thesis emphasizes that Wolfspeed's 300mm silicon carbide technology represents a mechanical necessity for power-hungry AI clusters, despite the market historically viewing the company as an electric vehicle play. The firm established a $85 price target, suggesting over 35% upside potential. The stock has tripled since the beginning of the year and currently trades above key moving averages. However, the article notes a significant concern: Wolfspeed currently receives coverage from just one Wall Street analyst, who rates it a Hold. Beyond AI applications, Citrini points to operational improvements at the company's Mohawk Valley Fab facility, where yields approaching 80% could transition the manufacturer into a margin-expansion machine. The company's $2 billion backlog and vertical integration of wafer supply provide additional competitive advantages, positioning Wolfspeed for sustained revenue growth.
